title: [Skyship, The Cells]
description: The metal floor throughout the area has been lowered by several feet from the entrance level.  The downslope of the changing level is gradual, shallowing out into a broad recession littered with tattered, putrid debris, including clothing, skeletal remains, and organic waste.  Thin pieces of cloth have been loosely arranged across the recessed floor as makeshift beds, while above a bright and opaque glaesine orb casts the area in a perpetual light.
